visualizerParams.title: Binary to Decimal Base Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The manual binary to decimal conversion is producing incorrect results. It seems the power-of-two weighting is being applied incorrectly in the loop. Find and fix the bug.

solution.explanation: Binary is base 2. To convert a bitstream to decimal as you traverse it from left to right, you must multiply the current total by 2 before adding the next bit. The buggy code incorrectly used 10, which would only work for decimal strings.
